content.en:
The second level of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate.

Ye Tian came here, the keeper of this level was even more powerful, his super-dimensional rule realm had definitely reached the level of five thousand Dao, and he had cultivated an innate multi-dimensional Dao body to the realm of the second layer of Dacheng Limit.

Moreover, the soul will of the other party has also reached the level of the eighth dimension.

The moment he fought with him, the other party showed a number of top-notch super-dimensional supernatural powers.

However, such strength is still not in Ye Tian's eyes.

Rumble!!!!

Under the sand and gravel of the Four Realms of Multi-dimensional Peerless Learning, the keeper of this second level was still shattered by him, defeated him, and passed the second level.

In this way, Ye Tian came to the third level.

The keeper of the third level is a woman, wearing a black robe, with a cold face, but her aura is extremely powerful, and her super-dimensional rule aura has reached the realm of "seven or eighty" to the realm of ten thousand daos, and she has also practiced an innate multi-dimensional dao body, and has reached the realm of the third layer.

"The strength of the gatekeeper of this level is very strong, second only to the Extinction Realm Lord who cooperated with me!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

I just don't know if this gatekeeper will be multi-dimensional mastery, if he can, then the attack power will definitely not be inferior to him.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian fought with him.

This gatekeeper does not know how to multi-dimensional mastery, after a fight, Ye Tian relied on multi-dimensional mastery to hit him again and again, but he did not use the eighth dimensional will mastery from beginning to end.

Ultimately.

Ye Tian still defeated the keeper of this third level, and then came to the fourth level.

As soon as he came to the fourth level, Ye Tian frowned slightly, judging from his breath, this fourth level keeper was almost the same as the third level.

"This gatekeeper must be multi-dimensional and unlearned, otherwise he wouldn't be so demonic!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Sure enough, after the battle, this gatekeeper directly displayed the Four Realms Multi-dimensional Peerless Learning, and his combat power was extremely terrifying, definitely no less than the Extinction Realm Lord.

In terms of attack power, Ye Tian was still inferior to this Extinction Realm Lord.

But.

After Ye Tianshi displayed the Eighth Dimensional Will Peerless Black Mother Sword, he cooperated with the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Sand and Gravel Robbery, and after killing for a long time, he finally reluctantly defeated the defender of the fourth level.

But because of this, his injuries are not light.

"It seems that my combat power is the combat power of the fourth level of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He looked at the Tianguan list, and the highest one on it had already broken through to the eighth level, so he could imagine how terrifying his strength was, maybe it was no less than the ordinary fifth realm.

In addition, there are two people who have passed the seventh level, thirty-seven people who have passed the sixth level, more than 100 people who have passed the fifth level, and even more people who have passed the fourth level, and there are hundreds of people.

As for the number one that has passed the third level, there are even more, and there are thousands of them.

However, many of the Fourth Realms on the Tianguan List are Fourth Realms that have survived one or more multi-dimensional tribulations, and now they are all trying to prepare for the impact on the Fifth Realm, and they usually don't see it at all.

"The strength of the Fourth Realm on the side of the Four Thousand Territory is too strong, there are countless strong people, and the Fourth Realm on the other side of the Five Thousand Territory has too little knowledge, it is estimated that they still think that their strength is quite good!" Ye Tian guessed.

But if you think about it carefully, the fourth realm on the other side of the 5,000th Territory is estimated to have never even been to the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, after all, they don't even have the strength of the first level, how can they spend so many multi-dimensional treasure coins to buy the Heavenly Pass Order.

"With my strength, I can only pass the fourth level of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Barrier, what kind of demon should that fourth realm who has passed the eighth level be? If you want to break through the tenth level, what kind of strength do you need?" Ye Tian was extremely curious.

After passing the fourth level, Ye Tian gave up passing the fifth level, after all, the strength gap in each level was very large, and he barely passed the fourth level, how could he have the strength to pass the fifth level, he still didn't want to be abused.

He came out of the fourth level.

Passing the fourth level naturally has a reward, but it is not a substantial reward.

There have been many multi-dimensional catastrophes in the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower, and if you give a substantial reward, no matter how many treasures you have, you will run out of treasures, and the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower has only one reward, that is, to observe the attack traces of the owner of the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's gaze was pulled to the tenth dimension by the ten-dimensional heavenly tower, and in the void of the tenth dimension, a projection appeared.

It was a white-robed young man, holding a long knife, and with a slight slash, many dimensions were instantly broken, and a terrifying blow seemed to be able to destroy countless extradimensional realms......

The mystery of this knife is extremely complex, but it is clearly displayed in front of him, allowing him to understand this knife little by little.

At the same time, a faint imprint entered his soul will, allowing him to comprehend the mystery of this sword from time to time, but this imprint could not be maintained for a long time, and at most it would last for a few extradimensional epochs, and it would completely dissipate.

Wow!

Ye Tian came out of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower.

At this time, he immediately comprehended the imprint of the sword, observed the projection of the imprint, and comprehended the mystery of it.

In addition, he always exerts multi-dimensional wisdom light, uses treasures such as the soul vase, and constantly analyzes and comprehends.

"It's wonderful, this knife is not like a multi-dimensional mastery, nor is it a will mastery, but more like a brand-new mastery that fuses the two kinds together. "

Subsequently.

Ye Tian went to find out the origin of this knife, but few forces knew about it, and after he paid a huge price, he learned the origin of this knife.

【Supreme Learning】

In fact, the full name is the supreme multi-dimensional will mastery, which combines the multi-dimensional mastery and the new mastery created by the will mastery, and the future far surpasses these two kinds of mastery, and integrates the power of the two kinds of mastery, and goes to the next level.

And the name of this supreme mastery is the ten-dimensional heavenly sword, which is the supreme mastery of the fifth realm, which integrates the multi-dimensional mastery of the five realms and the 4.7 of the will of the tenth dimension, and it is precisely by relying on this supreme mastery that the fifth realm can be called the invincible of the fifth realm.

And if you want to break through the tenth level of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate, you must create the supreme mastery of the fourth realm, otherwise it is impossible to break through.

Time passes.

Ye Tian continued to comprehend this supreme mastery of the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Sword, and after the imprint of this Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Sword dissipated, he had comprehended three hundred extra-dimensional epochs, and it was only a little superficial.

"It's too hard, it's too hard!"

Ye Tian sighed.

However, he still had some gains, although he couldn't comprehend the ten-dimensional heavenly sword, and it was impossible for him to create the supreme mastery of the fourth realm, but it was very helpful for him to create the multi-dimensional mastery of the four realms and the eighth-dimensional will of the will.

He wanted to create a few more four-realm multi-dimensional masteries and eighth-dimensional will masteries, which could also increase his strength.
